prompt: My team has two branches each with a new runic migration based on the same head revision. 'runic heads' shows two entries: abc123 and def456. How do I resolve this and what does the merge revision file look like?

assertions.text: Response shows the `runic merge abc123 def456 -m "..."` command
Merge revision file shows down_revision as a tuple, e.g. ("abc123", "def456")
Explains to run `runic upgrade head` after creating the merge revision
Does NOT suggest manually editing existing migration files as the resolution strategy
Merge revision function signature is def upgrade(op) -> None: (not using MigrationContext)
